title: Microsoft's EU Monopoly: Why Claude ISN'T on Teams! #shorts
summary: A commentary suggesting Microsoft's dominance in the EU market explains why Claude is not integrated into Teams, attributing this to Microsoft's preference for its own Copilot AI. The piece raises questions about monopoly dynamics in enterprise software.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that Microsoft's market dominance in the EU explains the absence of Claude integration in Teams, attributing the gap to Microsoft favoring its own Copilot AI. The commentary frames the issue through monopoly dynamics and vertical integration in enterprise software. The takeaway: a platform owner's control over distribution can shape which third-party AI models reach business users, raising questions about competition and market share.
